overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk through residential back alleys in Los Santos. The player walks down a warm-lit alley, crosses a street intersection with a pedestrian and garbage truck, then continues into a cooler-lit alley with the downtown skyline visible in the distance throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential back alley with garage doors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow residential alleyway between apartment buildings with warm yellow street lighting

entered.detail: row of closed garage doors on the left side of the alley
row of closed garage doors on the right side with trash bins
tall street light casting warm yellow illumination
lit skyscrapers visible in the distance between buildings
black garbage bins lined up against the left wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow residential back alley at night, flanked by garage doors on both sides. Warm yellow streetlights illuminate the cracked asphalt path while the downtown skyline glows in the distance. Trash bins line the left wall, and the atmosphere is quiet and empty.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open street intersection with stop sign painted on pavement
pedestrian in blue clothing crosses the street from right to left
green garbage truck drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, observing the stop sign, and crossing the street while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: walking across the street from right to left ahead of the camera
green garbage truck driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: white STOP text painted on the asphalt at the intersection
tall palm tree visible on the right side of the intersection
large green garbage truck with white cab passing by on the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley into a wider street intersection marked with a stop sign. A pedestrian crosses ahead while a garbage truck passes by on the right. The camera crosses the road, transitioning from the warm-lit alley to a more open area with mixed lighting and visible palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential back alley with apartment buildings

events.description: enters second narrow alleyway with cooler blue-toned lighting
lighting shifts to darker blue tones as the alley progresses

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through a darker residential alley with cooler ambient lighting and visible utility poles

entered.detail: multi-story apartment building with balconies and lit windows
residential building with covered parking on ground floor
wooden utility pole with power lines running along the alley

segments.scene_description: Walking through a second narrow residential alley with distinctly cooler, blue-toned lighting compared to the first. Apartment buildings with balconies line both sides, and utility poles run along the path. The downtown skyline remains visible ahead, providing a distant glow against the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through residential back alleys that transitions from warm, secluded corridors to a cooler, urban atmosphere. It begins by moving through a narrow alley flanked by garage doors and trash bins, where warm yellow streetlights illuminate the cracked asphalt against a distant, glowing skyline. As the camera emerges from the alley, the scene opens into a wider street intersection where a pedestrian crosses and a garbage truck passes by amidst the silhouettes of palm trees. The movement then shifts back into a second narrow alley, where the lighting transforms from warm gold to a distinct blue tone. This final stretch passes between apartment buildings with balconies and utility poles, maintaining a steady gaze toward the distant downtown skyline under the dark night sky.
